Imports and adds profileContactInfoPages.notes: Imports profileContactInfoPages and spreads into chapters with wrapperKey and prefillPatternEnabled.

Adds route protection logic in App.jsx t.notes: Adds Redux connect, checks isLoggedIn and formData?.ssn, skips localhost, redirects to manifest.rootUrl.

Creates or updates mock test fixtures (s.notes: Updates sip-get.json with full data structure under data.attributes.veteran. Updates returnUrl.

Does not remove or break any existing fo.notes: Keeps claimantAddressPage and veteranAddressPage. Notes removal of veteranServiceMemberInfoPage import since it is replaced by prefill pages, which is a reasonable design decision.

Registers prefillTransformer in formConf.notes: Registers prefillTransformer in formConfig after prefillEnabled: true.
